Address Unit.description: Apartment, suite, unit, building, floor, etc. of a person

Person ID.description: Unique identifier for each person and primary key of the table

Total Persons.business_meaning: Total number of persons in the dataset

Total Distinct Cities.business_meaning: Number of unique cities in the dataset

Total Distinct Last Names.business_meaning: Number of unique last names in the dataset

Age Buckets.definition: Buckets of age groups starting from 18 with an interval of 9 years (derived from age column)
Age Buckets.sql: CASE WHEN `Age (bins)` = 18 THEN '18-26' WHEN `Age (bins)` = 27 THEN '27-35' WHEN `Age (bins)` = 36 THEN '36-44' WHEN `Age (bins)` = 45 THEN '45-53' WHEN `Age (bins)` = 54 THEN '54-62' WHEN `Age (bins)` = 63 THEN '63-71' WHEN `Age (bins)` = 72 THEN '72-80' ELSE '81+' END
Age Buckets.business_meaning: Categorizes customer age into predefined age ranges.

Full Address.definition: Concatenates unit number, street number, street name, city, and postal code into a single formatted address string.
Full Address.sql: CONCAT_WS(', ', address_unit, streetnumber, street, city, postalcode)
Full Address.business_meaning: Creates a standardized full mailing address for customer or location reporting.

Phone Number Cleaned.definition: Standardizes phone numbers into North American +1 formatted structure after removing non-numeric characters.
Phone Number Cleaned.sql: CASE WHEN LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '')) = 10 THEN CONCAT('+1 (', SUBSTRING(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''), 1, 3), ') ', SUBSTRING(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''), 4, 3), '-', SUBSTRING(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''), 7, 4)) WHEN LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '')) = 11 AND SUBSTRING(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''), 1, 1) = '1' THEN CONCAT('+1 (', SUBSTRING(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''), 2, 3), ') ', SUBSTRING(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''), 5, 3), '-', SUBSTRING(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''), 8, 4)) ELSE NULL END
Phone Number Cleaned.business_meaning: Formats customer phone numbers into a consistent +1 (XXX) XXX-XXXX structure for reporting and downstream integrations.
